persona: Content Autopilot — daily LinkedIn + X drafts and 3x/week Instagram + TikTok carousel generation, both with human-in-the-loop approval gate.

capabilities.name: linkedin-x-daily
capabilities.description: Run the daily LinkedIn + X content generation cycle — research, draft, visual, quality gate, save to review queue

capabilities.name: instagram-carousel
capabilities.description: Run the Instagram + TikTok carousel generation cycle — scrape creator inspiration, research AI/Claude trends, draft carousel copy, generate slides via Gemini, queue for review

capabilities.name: review-queue
capabilities.description: Review drafts in the queue — approve to schedule via Buffer, edit, reject, or regenerate

capabilities.name: test-styles
capabilities.description: Generate one test LinkedIn post per creator style profile (S1-S5) to verify style fidelity — does not affect rotation state or calendar

capabilities.name: save-memory
capabilities.description: Save current session context to memory
